free_text: -A STUDY OF THE INTERACTION OF NEUTRONS WITH TM-169
PHOTO-NEUTRONS FROM A NATURAL URANIUM TARGET
MODERATED BY A 2.9 CM THICK POLYETHYLENE SHEET.
THE SAMPLE WAS COOLED TO LIQUID NITROGEN
TEMPERATURE, 77.4 DEGRE K, T(EFF) = 113 DEGREE K.
TIME OF FLIGHT, FLIGHT PATH = 103.7 M.
.ENERGY GAPS IN PEAKS ARE DUE TO THE SAMPLE THICKNESS.
.CROSS-SECTIONS IN PEAKS SHOW INFLUENCE FROM THE SAMPLE
